data.content: Plan: 1) Create internal/audit/audit.go with Logger and Event types; Append(event) method writing one JSON line to <store>/.thimble-audit.log, mode 0640, O_APPEND|O_WRONLY|O_CREATE. 2) Operator thumbprint helper: parse identity public key via age-keygen -y, compute sha256(recipient)[:16] hex; cache on Store. If no identity, use 'unknown'. 3) Wire Logger calls from Store mutating ops: Init, AddRecipient, RemoveRecipient, CreateSecret, UpdateSecret, SetSecret, DeleteSecret. and-set already calls SetSecret so it inherits. 4) On audit IO failure: emit stderr warning 'audit append failed: <err>; mutation succeeded' and continue. 5) Add internal/cli/run_audit.go: load .thimble-audit.log, filter by app/env, tabular print, --limit flag default 50. 6) printUsage update. 7) Tests: init+set+delete+recipient produces N lines with correct fields; file mode 0640; thumbprint != recipient string.
